summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 1:n iPad-Student relationship functionality. All backend tests passed (10/10). Frontend UI correctly shows iPad assignment counts per student and 'Limit erreicht' button for students at the maximum (3 iPads).
seed_data_creation: Using existing test data: Max Mustermann (2 iPads), Anna Schmidt (1 iPad), Peter Müller (3 iPads - limit reached), Lisa Weber (1 iPad)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 1:n features working correctly. Test data exists with students having various iPad counts including one at limit (Peter Müller with 3). Import/Export endpoints tested and working with proper merge of students appearing on multiple rows.

tested_features.1n_excel_import_merge: PASS - Students appearing on multiple rows are correctly merged into single student with multiple iPad assignments
tested_features.ipad_limit_enforcement: PASS - MAX_IPADS_PER_STUDENT=3 is enforced. Manual assignment returns 400 error when limit reached
tested_features.excel_export_format: PASS - Export returns valid .xlsx with one row per iPad assignment (student data duplicated)
tested_features.reimport_exported_data: PASS - Re-importing exported data correctly skips existing records
tested_features.ui_assignment_count_display: PASS - Students tab shows 'X iPad(s)' badge for each student
tested_features.ui_limit_reached_button: PASS - 'Limit erreicht' button shown (disabled/grayed) for students at limit
